nasb.text: holding to a form of godliness, although they have denied its power; Avoid such men as these.

esv.text: having the appearance of godliness, but denying its power. Avoid such people.

cnv.text: 有敬虔的形式，卻否定敬虔的能力；這些人你應當避開。

ccb.text: 虚有敬虔的外表，却无敬虔的实质。你要避开这样的人。

csbs.text: 有敬神的外表，却否定敬神的实质；这样的人你要避开。
